creator: freebsd@igalic.co
text:
and the same is true for emulators/qemu-user-static-devel.

In both ports, ONLY_FOR_ARCHS has been set to the current value since the beginning, with no _REASON.

ref: https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/issues/1048
and: https://github.com/qemu-bsd-user/qemu-bsd-user/issues/43
